title: iPSC Restriction Digest for Screening Edited Clones
author: Celeste M M. Karch
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.x8sfrwe

steps.title: Prepare the following reagents in a...
steps.instruction: Prepare the following reagents in a strip cap tube with the previously identified enzyme. %s %s CutSmart Buffer - 5.0 ml New England Biolabs Catalog #B7204S

steps.title: Incubate reaction at temperature ideal for...
steps.instruction: Incubate reaction at temperature ideal for the enzyme being used (e.g. 37°C , 42°C, 25°C, etc.)

steps.title: Incubate at appropriate temperature for 2-3 hours
steps.instruction: Incubate at appropriate temperature for 2-3 hours. 02:00:00

steps.title: Run the enzyme reaction on a gel to visualize product
steps.instruction: Run the enzyme reaction on a gel to visualize product.

steps.title: To make the gel, combine an...
steps.instruction: To make the gel, combine an appropriate amount of Agarose, TBE and Ethidium Bromide using the following guidelines. a. The 2% gel will be cast in one of the following ways: %s %s b. Combine Agarose and TBE in an appropriately sized flask and microwave until Agarose is completely dissolved. Swirl intermittently during heating. c. Once completely dissolved add appropriate amount of Ethidium Bromide to flask and swirl until dispersed evenly.

steps.title: Pour gel from flask into casting...
steps.instruction: Pour gel from flask into casting tray (be sure to add appropriate amount of combs to casting tray).

steps.title: Let sit for 30-40 minutes, or until firm
steps.instruction: Let sit for 30-40 minutes, or until firm. 00:30:00

steps.title: Place gel cast into the gel rig apparatus
steps.instruction: Place gel cast into the gel rig apparatus.

steps.title: Place lid on gel rig apparatus
steps.instruction: Place lid on gel rig apparatus.

steps.title: Run gel at 150 volts for...
steps.instruction: Run gel at 150 volts for 01:30:00 (checking at 01:00:00 to ensure samples have not run too far or off the gel).

steps.title: Turn off gel rig apparatus and remove cast
steps.instruction: Turn off gel rig apparatus and remove cast.

steps.title: Blot off excess TBE from cast
steps.instruction: Blot off excess TBE from cast.

steps.title: Analyze gel images and select potentially...
steps.instruction: Analyze gel images and select potentially edited clones based on banding patterns.
